opportunity: Clara, as the victim's assistant, regularly maintained the desk lamp and could easily tamper with its wiring.

clue_1.title: Desk Notes Timestamp
clue_1.detail: A stack of notes on the desk is dated 20:10, matching Thomas's claim of working until that time before leaving for coffee.

clue_2.title: Monitor Power Failure Log
clue_2.detail: The monitor's internal log shows the power feed cut at 20:00, meaning typing could not have continued to 20:15.

clue_3.title: Lamp Wiring Tampering
clue_3.detail: The lamp cord is frayed and a splice is visible; the flicker recorded matches a short‑circuit surge that would be lethal.

clue_4.title: Mug Tea Stain Timestamp
clue_4.detail: A tea ring on the mug’s coaster bears a faint clock imprint showing 20:13, confirming Martin left the lamp area at that time.

clue_5.title: Missing Pen on Desk
clue_5.detail: A pen is absent from the desk drawer; its whereabouts are unknown and unrelated to the murder.
